hooks.command: node -e "const c=[];process.stdin.on('data',d=>c.push(d));process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(c.join(''));const f=i.tool_input?.file_path||i.tool_response?.filePath||'';if(f&&/\\.(ts|js|json)$/.test(f)&&!/CLAUDE\\.md|package-lock\\.json/.test(f)){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:'Source file modified: '+f+'. Review and update CLAUDE.md at D:/Automation-Test/cdt-app-uat/CLAUDE.md if this change affects the documented architecture, commands, page objects, fixtures, or test patterns.'}}))}});"
